case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. GUILLERMO TAPIA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, GUILLERMO AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAPIA, GUILLERMO AN INDIVIDUAL $3,971.69 PRINCIPAL, $328.30 ATTORNEY FEES, $919.96 INTEREST, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,509.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
